description: Balanced food-water resilience across availability access stability quality adaptation equity and depletion risk.
Prioritizes sufficient food and water supply.
Prioritizes affordability distribution rights service access and inclusion.
Prioritizes consistent supply and access across seasons and shocks.
Prioritizes nutrition food safety water quality and sanitation.
Prioritizes learning flexibility monitoring and adjustment under changing conditions.
Prioritizes vulnerable users historically underserved communities and fair governance.
Prioritizes penalties for aquifer depletion soil degradation ecosystem decline and resource overuse.
